reach_why: Mostly revisits known worries about self-reference, evaluation drift, and representation; little genuinely new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously combines threshold vagueness, evaluator instability, and mediation artifacts into one skeptical critique.
falsifiable_why: Claims are testable only after defining metrics for threshold, stability, and discovery beyond representational reorganization.
explanation: It argues recursive self-improvement is underjustified without measurable thresholds, stable evaluation, and evidence of real discovery.
